note: Official expectation model only — live integration NOT executed.
authMethod: Webservice key as HTTP Basic username with an empty password (key:), over HTTPS.
commonIntegrationFailure: 401 when the webservice is disabled, the key lacks permission for the resource, or the password portion of Basic auth is not empty; XML returned unexpectedly when output_format=JSON is omitted.
preventionRule: Enable the Webservice in Advanced Parameters; grant the key per-resource permissions; use Basic auth with key as user and empty password; pass output_format=JSON.
